---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false

---

```{=html}


<div class="site-page">

<section class="site-intro">
  <div class="site-kicker">Reading · Tools · Inspiration</div>
  <h2>Resources</h2>
  <div class="site-lede">
    <p>In this page, you can find resources that I find useful/insightful for my work.</p>
    <p><span class="site-muted">This page is under construction. It will be updated irregularly, so please feel free to check back every now and then if you are interested.</span></p>
  </div>
</section>

<!--
<section class="site-section">
  <h2 class="site-section-title">Resource list</h2>
  <h3>Exploring complexity</h3>
  <a class="demo-button" href="/interactive/game_of_life/">Launch Game of Life demo →</a>
</section>
-->

</div>
```
